corpus.title: OIDC migration plan
corpus.body: Migrate authentication from session cookies to OpenID Connect. Includes identity provider setup and token validation.

corpus.title: SSO rollout for engineering
corpus.body: Single sign-on rollout across engineering teams. Authentication is centralized through the identity provider.

corpus.title: Query cache for hot endpoints
corpus.body: Add an LRU query cache in front of the read API to reduce database pressure on hot endpoints.

corpus.title: Benchmark harness
corpus.body: Continuous benchmark harness measuring p50 and p95 latency across critical request paths.

corpus.title: VPC peering review
corpus.body: Quarterly review of VPC peering connections, network ACLs, and route tables across environments.

corpus.title: IAM cleanup
corpus.body: Audit unused IAM roles and consolidate permissions. Identity and access cleanup across cloud accounts.

corpus.title: Incident runbook
corpus.body: Runbook for handling on-call incidents, including escalation policy and postmortem checklist.

corpus.title: Engineering onboarding
corpus.body: Onboarding checklist for new engineers including environment setup, repo access, and team introductions.
